specs.title: should test edge cases and error scenarios

stdout.text: Testing edge cases and error scenarios...
Edge Case and Error Scenario Testing:
Description: Test behavior under poor connectivity
Expected: Graceful degradation and appropriate loading indicators
Description: Test with edge case data volumes
Expected: System handles large data without breaking
Description: Test handling of unusual input characters
Expected: Input sanitized and handled securely
Description: Test limits and boundary conditions
Expected: Boundaries enforced with clear feedback
Expected: Session state maintained or gracefully recovered

specs.title: should validate error message quality and usability

stdout.text: Validating error message quality and usability...
Description: Error messages should be clear and understandable
1. Use plain language, avoid technical jargon
3. Specify which field or action caused the error
Description: Error messages should be visually prominent and well-placed
1. Use appropriate color coding (red for errors)
4. Ensure visibility without overwhelming the interface
Description: Error messages should appear at appropriate times
1. Show validation errors immediately when appropriate
2. Persist until the error is resolved
Description: Error messages should be accessible to all users
1. Associate with form fields using aria-describedby

- Header Elements: Accessible through embedded store iframe

- Cart Icon: Displayed in store header
- Category Navigation: CLOTHES, ACCESSORIES, ART categories in iframe
- Breadcrumbs: Available on category pages within store

specs.title: should validate footer structure and newsletter

stdout.text: ✓ Store iframe accessible for footer testing
1. Scroll to footer area of the page
3. Verify newsletter signup form is visible
4. Check for email input field and submit button
Validation: Newsletter form is accessible and visible
1. Enter valid email address in newsletter field
2. Click subscribe button or press enter
Validation: Valid email accepted and confirmation shown
2. Attempt to subscribe with invalid email
3. Check for email format validation error
Validation: Invalid email rejected with appropriate error message
Validation: Empty submission prevented with validation message

specs.title: should test footer navigation and links

stdout.text: Description: Test footer navigation links functionality
Validation: All footer links navigate to appropriate pages
Validation: Social media links open correct external pages
Validation: Contact information is accurate and well-formatted
Validation: Additional content displays correctly and links work
1. Footer sections may collapse on mobile
2. Newsletter form adapts to smaller screens
